online.title: Online (Cloud)
online.desc: Full access with automatic updates and highest performance. Perfect for institutions with reliable internet.

onPremise.title: On-Premise
onPremise.desc: Full control over your data with local hosting. Perfect for institutions requiring maximum security.

sync.title: Seamless Synchronization
sync.desc: Data automatically syncs between your Online and On-Premise servers whenever internet is available

multiCampus.title: Multi-Campus

hero.title: Connect, Learn, and Grow Together with VamVam Uniport
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform that makes education engaging, seamless, and effective for schools, teachers, and students. Real-time collaboration, interactive tools, and powerful insights — all in one place.

about.title: What is VamVam Uniport?
about.description: VamVam Uniport is a complete school management system designed to solve the common challenges institutions face with manual processes, scattered records, and inefficient communication.

centralized.title: Centralized Platform
centralized.desc: Manage student data, admissions, results, and payments all in one secure platform — no more scattered systems or paperwork.

efficiency.title: Efficient Operations
efficiency.desc: Reduce errors and delays with automated processes that help schools operate more efficiently and deliver better experiences.

accessibility.title: Always Accessible
accessibility.desc: Available on web and mobile, ensuring staff and students can access what they need, whenever they need it.

solution.title: Complete Solution
solution.desc: From admissions to academics, finance to communication — VamVam Uniport brings everything together in one powerful platform.

accountTypes.title: Built for Everyone Four Powerful Account Types
accountTypes.subtitle: VamVam Uniport provides a dedicated, role-specific experience for every member of the education ecosystem

student.title: Student Account
student.subtitle: Learning made engaging and organized
features: Register and or Pay Resit fees online
Sign courses and Download Form B online
View Courses failed / Unvalidated courses online
Apply & pay for transcript Delivery Online
Receive class, departmental & Course notification through the app

teacher.title: Teacher Account
teacher.subtitle: VamVam Uniport provides a dedicated, role-specific experience for every member of the education ecosystem
features: Access HOD Center as head of Department if you are assigned role
Allocate courses and lecturers in a program if you are HOD
View all programs & class list for all programs in your department
View course coverage reports as HOD
Edit student CA Marks as HOD
View course list and Class list for courses you are teaching
Take and View students attendance reports
Send course notification as lecturer and Departmental Notification as HOD through the App

solutions.title: Complete Solutions for Every Need
solutions.subtitle: VamVam Uniport brings the entire university or school system into one digital platform
solutions.bottomLine: VamVam Uniport is solving one big problem: bringing the entire university or school system into one digital platform.
